ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the simulation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the simulation ended */,
  "network_topology" INTEGER /* Description of the network topology used in the simulation */,
  "protocol" INTEGER /* Communication protocol used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., real-time, offline, etc.) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, etc.) */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, running, paused, etc.) */,
  "simulation_results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation (e.g., success, failure, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_protocol FOREIGN KEY ("protocol") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_network_topology FOREIGN KEY ("network_topology") REFERENCES network_topologies ("topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uav_communications" (
  "comm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this communication event is part of */,
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UAV involved in the communication */,
  "connect_time" INTEGER /* Time when the UAV connected */,
  "current_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the UAV */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Coordinates of the UAV's current position */,
  "current_block" INTEGER /* Block number where the UAV is currently located */,
  "sender_state" INTEGER /* State of the sender (e.g., 1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  "sender_rate" TEXT /* Rate of data transmission from the sender */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., video, audio, data, etc.) */,
  "data_transmission_rate" REAL /* Rate of data transmission */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Rate of packet loss */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uav_communications_current_block FOREIGN KEY ("current_block") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uav_communications_sender_state FOREIGN KEY ("sender_state") REFERENCES sender_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uav_communications_uav_id FOREIGN KEY ("uav_id") REFERENCES uavs ("uav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uav_communications_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uavs" (
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UAV */,
  "uav_name" TEXT /* Name of the UAV */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the UAV */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the UAV */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the UAV */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude of the UAV */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used by the UAV (e.g., camera, GPS, etc.) */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the UAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_topologies" (
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network topology */,
  "topology_name" TEXT /* Name of the network topology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network topology */,
  "topology_type" TEXT /* Type of network topology (e.g., mesh, star, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* Type of protocol (e.g., TCP/IP, UDP, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the block */,
  "block_size" REAL /* Size of the block (e.g., area, volume, etc.) */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of block (e.g., urban, rural, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sender_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sender state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the sender state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sender state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation (e.g., success, failure, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
